reason: The provided code has a clear structure, but it lacks implementation of AI players and visualization in the command line. The necessary libraries are not installed.

section_feedback.Section 1 - Constants and Imports: Install pygame library using pip install pygame
section_feedback.Section 2 - Chess Piece Classes: Implement AI logic for playing multiple strategies by adding methods to each piece class (e.g., move, attack)
section_feedback.Section 3 - Chess Board and Move Notatio: Develop a method to display the board in the command line using ASCII characters. Implement move notation recording by tracking moves made during the game.
section_feedback.Section 4 - AI Players and Game Logic: Implement AI player logic for playing multiple strategies. This can be done by creating separate classes for each strategy or by adding methods to the existing piece classes.
section_feedback.Section 5 - Main Entry Point: Modify the main entry point to create instances of the chess board, pieces, and AI players. Implement game loop to handle user input and update the board accordingly.
